{{Quote|Brea and Senni Tonnika, I do believe. How nice of you to drop back into sight again. You can't imagine how brokenhearted Grand Moff Argon has been since your departure. I'm sure he'll be pleased to see you again. As well as the twenty-five thousand you stole from him.|Colonel Parq|<ref name="Hammertong">{{StoryCite|story=Hammertong: The Tale of the "Tonnika Sisters"|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''Argon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was conned out of 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] by the [[Tonnika sisters/Legends|Tonnika sisters]] and vowed to track them down no matter where they hid in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Agents loyal to Argon were deployed during the search for the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after the theft of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]],<ref name="GG1">''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]''</ref> including [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Parq]]. During the search, Parq arrested two women who he believed to be the Tonnika sisters in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]; in reality, they were the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]]s [[Shada D'ukal]] and [[Karoly D'ulin]] who had disguised themselves as [[Brea Tonnika/Legends|Brea]] and [[Senni Tonnika/Legends|Senni Tonnika]] while on Tatooine.<ref name="Hammertong" />
